title: Returns Page: All Fields Required + Video Upload Validation + Admin Video Review

requirements.text: Update the Returns Page (/returns) form so that ALL fields are required: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, and Video Upload. The form must be blocked from submission if any field is empty or no video is uploaded.

quotes: All form fields must be REQUIRED. The form cannot be submitted if any field is empty.
Required fields: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, Upload Video

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the form with any empty field is prevented and does not call the backend.
All six fields (Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, Video Upload) are marked required.
Inline per-field error messages appear on attempted submission when a field is empty.

Error messages match exactly: 'Order number is required.', 'Customer name is required.', 'Email is required.', 'Reason for return is required.', 'Message is required.', 'A product condition video is required to submit a return request.'
Form submission proceeds only when all six fields pass validation.

requirements.text: Add a mandatory video upload section to the Returns Page (/returns) with the section title 'Upload Unboxing / Condition Video' and description 'To process a return request, please upload a video showing the condition of the product.' Video must be MP4, MOV, or WEBM format only, maximum 50MB. Show an inline error 'A product condition video is required to submit a return request.' if no video is selected on submission. Show a file preview (video element) and upload progress bar after a file is selected.

quotes: A product condition video is required to submit a return request.

acceptanceCriteria: Section heading reads exactly 'Upload Unboxing / Condition Video'.
Section description reads exactly 'To process a return request, please upload a video showing the condition of the product.'
Only MP4, MOV, and WEBM files are accepted; selecting any other format shows a validation error.
Files larger than 50MB are rejected with an appropriate error message.
After selecting a valid video file, a video preview element is displayed.
An upload progress indicator is shown while the video is being prepared/uploaded.
Attempting to submit without a video shows the error: 'A product condition video is required to submit a return request.'
No changes are made to existing UI design, colors, layout, or styling.

requirements.text: Update the backend (main.mo) to store return requests with all required fields: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Reason for Return, Message, and the uploaded video (stored as a Blob/[Nat8] on-chain). Ensure the submitReturnRequest endpoint accepts and persists the video data.

quotes: Videos stored on-chain in the canister for persistence
Admin can play videos inline and download them

acceptanceCriteria: The ReturnRequest type includes fields for orderNumber, customerName, email, reasonForReturn, message, and videoData (Blob or [Nat8]).
The submitReturnRequest function accepts all six fields including the video blob.
Submitted return requests including video data are persisted in stable storage and survive canister upgrades.
The getReturnRequests function returns all stored return requests including the video data.

requirements.text: Update the Admin Panel (/admin) to display submitted return requests showing: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Message, and the uploaded video. Admin must be able to play the video inline and download it. The existing PIN protection must remain completely untouched.

quotes: Existing PIN protection left completely untouched
Displays submitted return requests: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Message, and uploaded video
Admin can play videos inline and download them
Videos stored on-chain in the canister for persistence

acceptanceCriteria: The Admin Panel at /admin displays all submitted return requests.
Each return request entry shows: Order Number, Customer Name, Email, Message, and the uploaded video.
Videos are playable inline within the admin panel using an HTML video element.
A download button or link is available for each video, allowing the admin to download the video file.
The existing PIN protection for /admin is not modified in any way.
No changes are made to existing UI design, colors, layout, or styling.

constraints: Do not modify authentication, PIN protection, or admin access control in any way.
Do not change UI design, layout, colors, or styling on any existing page.
Immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, components/ui) must not be edited.
All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo).
nonGoals: Changing the visual design, color scheme, or layout of any page.
Adding or modifying authentication or routing.
Storing videos externally (must be stored on-chain in the canister).
Making Message field optional (it is now required per this request).
Adding any new pages or routes beyond /returns and /admin.
